notes: Area map of Titchfield. Elen current enters at Great Posbrook Farm and St Peter's Church; Belinus current enters at St Peter's Church. Meeting points: St Peter's Church, Titchfield Abbey.
Node detail for St Catherine's Hill. Central line passes through Labyrinth node. Both currents meet at Trees and Labyrinth nodes.

Region overview of South Hampshire. Central line passes through Roman Fort Curbridge, Marwell Manor, St Catherine's Hill, Winchester Cathedral within 100m. Nodes on currents as listed in extraction notes.

Area currents map of Winchester. Central line passes through School House, Winchester College, St Swithun, Cheyney Court, Museum, St. Lawrence's, Library, and Theatre Royal. Belinus current passes through Wolvesey Castle, Winchester Cathedral, St. Thomas Church, Peninsula Barracks, Great Hall, Westgate Museum, West Gate, Hyde Gate and St. Bartholomew's Church. Elen current passes through Chantry, Church, Winchester College, Pilgrims' School, Winchester Cathedral, Tower of St. Maurice, The Brooks and Hyde Abbey. Meeting point: Winchester Cathedral (Belinus + Elen). Auxiliary: Leisure Centre, Guildhall, Barracks Museums, Visitor Centre and Historic Resources Centre.
